label: Tree-of-Thought & branch-and-evaluate reasoning

node.label: Tree-of-Thought & branch-and-evaluate reasoning
node.definition: Tree-of-Thought methods branch from intermediate reasoning states, evaluate partial solutions, and backtrack or continue search rather than following one chain.
node.why_it_matters: They make deliberation explicit when a problem benefits from alternatives, lookahead, and recovery from early mistakes.
limitations: Branching grows rapidly, state evaluation can be unreliable, and thought representations are difficult to canonicalize.

They make deliberation explicit when a problem benefits from alternatives, lookahead, and recovery from early mistakes.
Branching grows rapidly, state evaluation can be unreliable, and thought representations are difficult to canonicalize.
